news.summary: Severe weather conditions led to extensive power outages affecting nearly 97,000 customers within the service area. However, diligent efforts by Duke Energy have successfully reduced the number of outages to around 1,000. The restoration of power has been carried out effectively, with over 98% of impacted customers in Indiana having their electricity restored as of 9 a.m. ET on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Duke Energy restores power for 98% of customers after storm; outages reduced from 97,000 to 1,000 in Indiana.
French Industry Minister: Europe wants to avoid escalation and must stay united.
French Industry Minister: Europe must make a proportional and firm response to US tariffs.

news.summary: A subscription to the "United States Retail Tenant Directory Online Subscription" database is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The retail industry is highly volatile, with hundreds of companies dissolving, merging, or being acquired each year. Additionally, nearly 25% of leasing decision-makers change jobs annually. This database tracks these real-time changes to provide the most up-to-date and accurate information. The Retail Tenant Directory offers online access through a subscription model.
news.headline: United States Retail Tenant Directory 2025: Online portal with nearly 5,100 retail chains, providing real-time accurate information.

news.summary: Despite a downturn in traditional financial markets, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) remains stable. The cryptocurrency has been trading within a consistent range for the past three weeks, allowing for lucrative short-term trading opportunities. While there have been no significant long liquidations at the bottom of this range, continuous selling of spot positions indicates the possibility of a potential decline in Bitcoin's value. Cryptocurrency trader Niels also shares insights on this situation. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price holds at $82,000 amidst volatile markets, with traders speculating on potential breakdown; more on Benzinga.

news.summary: Brightspeed, the nation's third-largest fiber broadband provider, is offering a promotion to its current customers in Charlotte, N.C. Customers who choose to upgrade to fiber service will receive the first month free. This initiative aims to provide more homes and businesses with ultrafast, reliable internet connectivity. The promotion was launched on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Brightspeed offers new residential customers three months free on fiber internet. Upgrades get first month free.
Terms set for Riksbank auctions of government bonds.

news.summary: After severe storms, the number of outages in the company's service area has decreased significantly from 69,000 to 2,400. The company is closely monitoring upcoming forecasts for potential heavy rain and flooding throughout the weekend. Duke Energy has successfully restored power to over 96% of its customers who were impacted by the recent weather events in Cincinnati. The quick response has helped to alleviate the disruption caused by the storms and the company continues to work towards fully restoring service to all affected customers.
news.headline: Duke Energy restores 96% power within 36 hours in Ohio and Kentucky. Outages down to 2,400 from 69,000. Hard-hit areas recovering.

Trifork Group launches share-based incentive plan for 2025.

news.summary: The stock market experienced a significant downturn as the Dow Jones fell by 1,100 points amid escalating fears of a trade war between the United States and China. Tech giants such as Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla were among the companies hit hard by the market decline. This information was detailed in a report without stating the source.
news.headline: Dow Jones drops 1,100 points on trade war fears, Apple, Nvidia, Tesla suffer losses.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 4, 2025, an inventor from Mount Holly, N.C. shared the inspiration behind THE SEAT ROTATOR, a new product aimed at simplifying vehicle entry. The innovator stated that the invention stemmed from a desire for a more effortless way to sit and face forward when getting into a vehicle. THE SEAT ROTATOR offers a solution to the common challenge of accessing vehicle seats.
news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Mount Holly creates seat rotator device to aid entering vehicle seat, easing traditional struggle.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of April 4, 2025, it has been reported that the worldwide US Autoinjectors Market is forecasted to grow to a worth of US$1.45 billion by the year 2030, significantly up from US$0.65 billion recorded in 2024. This growth represents a substantial Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.2%. Furthermore, the market for autoinjector finished formulations is expected to experience a notable surge in value...
news.headline: US Autoinjectors Market to reach $1.45 billion by 2030, growing at 14.2% CAGR from $0.65 billion in 2024.

news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent cryptocurrency prices and developments. Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies have shown signs of recovery following a recent decline. For more information, visit Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices rebound after recent dip; Bitcoin and cryptos recover ground. News update by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Sandvik, a company based in Stockholm, made a recent announcement on April 4, 2025, that they have finalized an agreement to purchase Osa Demolition Equipment S.r.l. (OSA), a renowned Italian company that specializes in producing demolition tools and hydraulic hammers. Following the acquisition, OSA will be integrated as a distinct business unit under the Attachment Tools division within Sandvik. This strategic move aims to enhance Sandvik's capabilities in the demolition tools sector and bolster its overall business prospects.
news.headline: Sandvik acquires Osa Demolition Equipment, Italy-based manufacturer of hydraulic hammers. Reported as a business unit.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in San Jose, California, LEOTEK, a leading global intelligent transportation service provider, revealed that its Interlux AI Traffic Signal System, developed in-house, received the Silver Award in the Smart City Mobility Infrastructure category at the 2025 Edison Awards.
news.headline: LEOTEK wins Silver at 2025 Edison Awards for Interlux AI Traffic Signal System in Smart City Mobility.

news.summary: Tryg has gathered projections for the upcoming Q1 2025 interim report from 13 financial analysts. The consensus estimates are based on the input from these analysts.
news.headline: Tryg A/S releases consensus estimates for Q1 2025 interim report based on input from 13 financial analysts.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on April 4, 2025, United Airlines Teamsters aviation maintenance technicians (AMTs) are demanding a fair contract after rejecting a proposal by an overwhelming 99.5 percent majority. The technicians deemed the offer unrealistic and insulting, highlighting the need for better terms.
news.headline: United Airlines Teamsters rally at Orlando International Airport as aviation technicians demand fair contract after rejecting insulting proposal; 99.5% rejection rate.

news.summary: New York residents can now enjoy Live Rosin Infused Pre-Rolls that are readily accessible in the market. These pre-rolls provide users with a unique experience as they contain live rosin, a potent cannabis extract rich in terpenes and cannabinoids. The availability of Live Rosin Infused Pre-Rolls in New York gives consumers more options for their cannabis enjoyment.
news.headline: FLUENT's Hyer Kind brand introduces Live Rosin Infused Pre-Rolls in New York, expanding market reach.
Cambodia to lower tariffs on some US imports to 5% from 35%.

news.summary: In Washington, the National Association for Veterans Rights (NAVR) applauds South Dakota Governor Larry Rhoden for signing House Bill 1238 (HB 1238) into law, aiming to protect veterans seeking aid in veterans' benefit issues. This Act establishes safeguards for veterans encountering challenges with their VA benefits. Governor Rhoden's approval of this bill aligns with a national trend towards shielding veterans from fraudulent practices, ensuring their benefits remain secure.
news.headline: NAVR praises South Dakota Governor Rhoden for signing HB 1238 to protect Veterans’ rights, reinforcing critical benefits protections.
US Agriculture Sec. Rollins memo pushes forest service to increase timber outputs.

news.summary: A global food services and facilities management leader, Sodexo, has recently signed a partnership agreement with AtlantiCare in Egg Harbor Township, New Jersey. The agreement, effective as of June 21, will see Sodexo providing on-site operational services to AtlantiCare. This collaboration aims to enhance patient and employee satisfaction levels by offering top-notch clinical nutrition expertise, cutting-edge environmental services, facilities management, healthcare technology, and more. This partnership signifies a strategic move to elevate overall service quality.
news.headline: Sodexo partners with AtlantiCare, largest healthcare system in SE New Jersey for integrated services, effective June 21.

news.summary: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT), a prominent generative artificial intelligence (Gen AI) strategic consultancy, shared insights from its 2025 Key Issues Study. The report indicates that AI is set to transform supply chains, with around 50% of supply chain leaders currently experimenting with Gen AI. However, widespread implementation is still in its early stages. As economic instability and financial constraints increase, supply chain executives are urged to take immediate action to speed up the adoption of AI-driven changes.
news.headline: The Hackett Group sees rising AI adoption in supply chain amid economic pressures, with 50% testing Gen AI.Deployment still nascent.
Grayscale submits prospectus for Solana ETF with SEC, eliminates staking feature.

news.summary: In Dublin, California on April 4, 2025, TriNet (NYSE: TNET), a top provider of human resources solutions for small and medium-sized businesses, shared plans to unveil their financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025 ahead of the U.S. market.
news.headline: TriNet (NYSE: TNET) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 25. Leading HR solutions provider for SMBs.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) announced their plans for the first quarter of 2025. The earnings release is set for Thursday, April 24, 2025, around 7:30 a.m. (Eastern Time). In addition, a conference call will also be held on the same day. This information was shared by the company.
news.headline: Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) announces Q1 2025 earnings release on April 24 at 7:30 a.m. (Eastern).

news.summary: Winter Haven, Florida - On April 4, 2025, SouthState Corporation (NYSE: SSB) disclosed its plan to unveil its first quarter 2025 earnings report on April 24, 2025, following the market's closing. After the release, interested stakeholders can obtain a copy of SouthState's financial performance for the quarter.
news.headline: SouthState Corporation (NYSE: SSB) will release Q1 2025 earnings on April 24, 2025, after market close.

news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on April 4, 2025, DuPont revealed that their cutting-edge material technologies secured four accolades at the esteemed 2025 Edison Awards™. Out of numerous contenders, DuPont clinched two Gold honors, one Silver, and one Bronze award. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.
news.headline: DuPont wins 4 Edison Awards for innovative material technologies - 2 Gold, 1 Silver, 1 Bronze.

news.summary: A new facility in Moosic, PA has recently been inaugurated, ensuring the continuity of jobs, driving growth, and reinforcing the iconic status of the Ring Pop brand. The 120,000 square-foot factory opened on April 4, 2025, in response to a production halt that jeopardized supply. This new development marks a significant comeback for Ring Pop and secures its presence in the market.
news.headline: Ring Pop opens new 120,000 sq/ft U.S. manufacturing plant in Moosic, PA, securing jobs and fueling growth.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Chicago, an announcement was made regarding DraftKings NFT transactions. Individuals who engaged in buying, selling, or holding DraftKings NFTs between August 11, 2021, and the judgment date are urged to review the notice. If you participated in any DraftKings NFT transactions during this period, it is important to take note of this notification.
news.headline: DraftKings NFT settlement proposed by Kirby McInerney LLP for transactions between August 11, 2021, and judgment date.

news.summary: In Akron, Ohio on April 4, 2025, FirstEnergy Corp revealed the appointment of Nick Pearson as the Vice President of Federal Government Affairs, slated to commence on April 7. Pearson, assigned to manage the company's Washington, D.C. offices, will lead interactions with federal government entities. FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE: FE) made the announcement, without specifying the source.
news.headline: FirstEnergy appoints Nick Pearson as Vice President, Federal Government Affairs, starting April 7. #NYSE: FE

news.summary: In a groundbreaking development on April 4, 2025, in Bergen, Norway, TikTok Live, in collaboration with Vizrt and Blinx, pushed the boundaries of live streaming by incorporating interactive Extended Reality (XR). This innovative partnership achieved a global milestone for content creation platforms. The initiative revolutionizes TikTok's gifting culture and enhances user engagement through state-of-the-art technology. The fusion of Vizrt's live production expertise and Blinx's digital capabilities marks a significant leap forward in the realm of interactive content streaming.
news.headline: Vizrt and Blinx collaborate with TikTok Live to create interactive XR experiences for users. World's first content creation platform.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 4, 2025, a Lancaster, S.C. inventor discussed the creation of a innovative window shade, called the PRIVACY SUN SHADE. The inventor aimed to enhance privacy while maintaining an outside view. This design is intended to boost safety along with these benefits.
news.headline: Inventor from Lancaster, SC creates Privacy Sun Shade for enhanced privacy without blocking view.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data suggests that the United States Machine Vision Market is projected to hit a value of $2.35 billion by 2028, a significant increase from the $1.69 billion recorded in 2023. This signifies a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.8% anticipated from 2023 to 2028, as highlighted in a fresh report released by MarketsandMarkets™. The growth trend in the US machine vision sector is slated to continue, showcasing a positive trajectory for the industry.
news.headline: USA Machine Vision Market to reach $2.35 billion by 2028, up from $1.69 billion in 2023, with a CAGR of 6.8%.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of April 4, 2025, the AI BMS market is categorized into LV BMS and HV BMS, with applications in consumer electronics and automobiles. In 2023, the global AI BMS market was valued at approximately USD 6.5 billion and is projected to reach around USD 17.32 billion in the near future.
news.headline: AI BMS market to reach $17.3B by 2030, growing at 15% CAGR. Global market valued at $6512M in 2023.

news.summary: F45 Training, a renowned fitness community known for its dynamic group workouts, has unveiled plans for National Recommit to Your Fitness Day. The initiative aims to motivate individuals to revisit their fitness objectives and adopt a healthier lifestyle through regular exercise and purposeful efforts. Set to occur on April 5th, symbolizing the F45 brand, this annual event encourages people to prioritize their well-being and work towards achieving long-term health goals.
news.headline: F45 Training introduces National Recommit to Your Fitness Day on April 5 to inspire individuals to prioritize their health and fitness goals.

news.summary: The US Customer Data Platform Market is projected to increase from USD 1.9 billion in 2024 to USD 6.4 billion in 2028, with a compound annual growth rate of 35.9%. The growth is fueled by the significance of AI-driven customer insights, personalization, and emergence of composable CDPs. Key companies in this market include Oracle, SAP, Adobe, Twilio, Microsoft, and more. The professional services segment dominated the market in 2024 due to the surging demand for specialized expertise. However, challenges like the shift to cookieless advertising and the high implementation costs of CDPs may hinder market expansion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US Customer Data Platform Market set to reach $6.4 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 35.9%. Dominated by Oracle, Adobe & Salesforce. AI-driven insights driving growth but cookieless advertising and high implementation costs pose challenges. Professional services segment leads market in 2024. Key companies include Oracle, Adobe, Microsoft, and more.

news.headline: SportsMed Physical Therapy opens new clinic in Riverdale, NJ, expanding its services to more communities in New Jersey.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee, YA Group (YA), a prominent company in forensic consulting, engineering, and risk mitigation services, revealed its collaboration with Encore Group (Encore), a well-known scheduling services firm specializing in construction.
news.headline: YA Group acquires Encore Group for enhanced construction consulting, engineering, & risk mitigation. Nashville, April 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on April 04, 2025, EHang Holdings Limited, a top Urban Air Mobility technology platform company (Nasdaq: EH), announced that the current tariff changes between China and the United States should not significantly affect the company’s operations.
news.headline: EHang, leading UAM tech company, sees no impact from recent US-China tariff actions on operations.

news.summary: A recent study by MarketsandMarkets™ projects the Medical Filtration Market to reach USD 9.35 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 6.8%. The market is driven by regulatory frameworks, demand for high-quality filtration solutions, technological advancements in healthcare, and prevalence of chronic diseases. Key players in the market include Merck KGaA, 3M, Danaher, Sartorius AG, Veolia, Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc, and others. Drivers include growing demand for high-quality filtration solutions, while challenges include the high cost of advanced filtration systems and disposal of filters. PES accounts for the largest share in the market by material, and nanofiltration is the fastest growing process technology. North America is a significant market in this sector. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Medical Filtration Market projected to reach $9.35 billion by 2030 at 6.8% CAGR driven by regulatory frameworks and demand for quality filtration solutions. Key players include Merck KGaA, 3M, and Danaher. Top findings: PES dominates market by material; Nanofiltration is fastest-growing technology.

news.summary: Jack Nathan Medical Corp (TSXV: JNH; OTCQB: JNHMF) in Toronto, known for operating Jack Nathan Mexico and Jack Nathan MedSpa, a top healthcare network in Mexico and leading MedSpa operator in Canada, revealed their ongoing assessment of operational sustainability by seeking collaboration with fresh retail and corporate associates. Additionally, they are contemplating strategic moves such as mergers and acquisitions for their Mexico subsidiary.
news.headline: Jack Nathan Mexico considers mergers & acquisitions for continuity; one of Mexico’s largest private healthcare networks.
